title: ProductOS V10 — 4-Minute Product Demo

opening_hook.script: Sarah is a Senior PM. She spends 15 hours every week on manual competitive research, PRD writing, and strategy decks. Next week, her CTO asked for a competitive analysis in a leadership review. Let's see what happens.
opening_hook.visual: Split screen: PM calendar showing blocked time → transition to ProductOS dashboard → click 'Generate Competitive Analysis'

segments.visual: ProductOS dashboard with CompetitorAlpha listed. PM types 'scan CompetitorAlpha' in Cmd+K palette. Loading bar with real-time results arriving from website, pricing page, blog, G2.
segments.audio: Sarah types a single command. ProductOS scans CompetitorAlpha's website, pricing page, blog, and G2 reviews simultaneously. In 90 seconds, she has a structured competitive intelligence alert.
segments.key_message: Competitive intelligence that used to take 4 hours now takes 90 seconds.

segments.visual: Competitive intelligence alert card: 'CompetitorAlpha launched AI PRD generation.' Impact assessment highlights overlapping V10 roadmap. Recommended PM action with timeframe: 'Within 24 hours.'
segments.audio: The alert tells Sarah exactly what changed, why it matters to ProductOS, and what to do about it. She shares the alert with her CTO directly from the dashboard.
segments.key_message: Every competitive alert includes impact analysis and recommended action — PM doesn't have to analyze raw data.

segments.visual: Product Health Dashboard: PESTLE spider chart with trend arrows, segment health heatmap, persona satisfaction cards, hypothesis portfolio tree with risk heat coloring, execution tracker, top-5 recommended actions.
segments.audio: Sarah opens her Product Health Dashboard. In one surface, she sees: PESTLE environmental analysis, segment penetration rates, persona satisfaction trends, hypothesis validation progress, sprint execution status, and — most importantly — the top 5 actions she should take today.
segments.key_message: One dashboard replaces 8 tools. PM sees their entire product universe in one view.

segments.visual: Prototype variant comparison: 3 interactive HTML dashboards side-by-side. PM clicks through Variant A (clean minimalist with wizard flow), then Variant B (bold dashboard-first), then Variant C (data-dense professional).
segments.audio: ProductOS doesn't just write a PRD — it generates 3 working interactive HTML prototypes with different design directions. Sarah compares them side by side, picks the best one, and shares it with her engineering lead for feedback.
segments.key_message: PM goes from concept to working prototype without designers or developers.

segments.visual: Auto-generated marketing content pack: messaging house, battle card, blog post brief, email sequence. One-click export to Google Slides.
segments.audio: When Sarah is ready to launch, ProductOS generates her marketing content pack — messaging, competitive comparison, blog posts, email sequences. She exports to Google Slides for her leadership presentation.
segments.key_message: PM becomes a one-person marketing team. Everything generated from the same product truth.

closing_cta: ProductOS V10. Your PM Superpowers, Automated. Start your free trial at productOS.dev.
target_audience: Product Managers and PM leaders evaluating AI tooling
